subcodes.first_line: O Baha'u'llah! Thanks be unto Thee that these handmaidens are attracted to Thee and are turned toward Thy Kingdom, having no purpose save Thy good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهاءالله شکر ترا که این کنیزان منجذب تواند و متوجه بملکوت تو مقصدی جز رضای تو ندارند
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the concourse on high, @service to others; to the Cause of God
